_meta.role: 不列顛城堡廚師；前野豬獵人，因獻烤豬肉得 Lord British 賞識而為宮廷掌廚。光膀肌肉男、汗濕生光。對聖者一見傾心（依玩家性別 $G 顯示不同台詞），含浪漫求愛意味、提及『火爐邊共度良夜』等。

translations.en: Maldric
translations.note: 人名音譯；前置空格保留

translations.en: a bare chested, muscular man, his body gleaming with sweat.*
translations.zh: 一個赤膊肌肉男，汗水使其身軀閃閃發光。*

translations.en: "Excuse me a moment." He pulls a napkin from his belt and mops at his brow. "Now, what were you saying?"
translations.zh: 「失陪片刻。」他自腰帶抽出一條布巾擦汗。「來，方才汝說什麼？」

translations.en: "Wait a minute," he interrupts, "I recognize you... You're the Avatar! I've always wanted to meet you."
translations.zh: 「且慢，」他打斷道，「我認得汝…汝乃聖者！我一直渴望相見。」

translations.en: From the day I first saw your portrait, I knew you must be the most beautiful woman in all Britannia."
translations.zh: 自初見汝之畫像，我便知汝必為不列顛尼亞最美之女子。」
translations.note: 對女性聖者；Britannia → 不列顛尼亞

translations.en: You're the greatest hero in all the land."
translations.zh: 汝乃全境最偉大之英雄。」

translations.en: "Oh, $G Avatar, 'tis an unexpected pleasure to see you again!"
translations.zh: 「噢，$G聖者，再見汝實乃意外之喜！」

translations.en: "Hey, my old buddy $P! Good to see you again."
name
"Maldric, I am. Once Maldric the @boar hunter, now Maldric the cook."
translations.zh: 「在下馬德力。@boar（昔）為野豬獵人，今為廚子也。」

translations.en: once,boar,hunt
"Aye, I used to live in the @forest and hunt wild boars."
translations.zh: 「啊，吾曾居於@forest（森林）中，獵殺野豬。」

translations.en: "But one day I presented a @roast boar as a gift to his @majesty, and he liked it so much he hired me as his @cook."
translations.zh: 「某日獻@roast（烤豬）於@majesty（陛）下，他甚喜，遂聘吾為其@cook（御廚）。」

translations.en: maje
"Yes, Lord @British himself."
fore
"Those were good times. But I'm happy here."
translations.zh: 「彼時美好。然此處亦堪稱樂土。」

translations.en: pres,gift,roas,like
"The secret is in the spices. It's an old family @recipe."
translations.zh: 「秘訣在於香料。乃我家傳老@recipe（祕）方也。」

translations.en: secr,fami,reci
"I'll never tell.
Though for one so sweet, I must say I'm tempted.
translations.zh: 然對如此甜美之人，吾不免心動。

translations.en: job
"I @cook for all those who live in the @castle, and for any @guests who dine with Lord British as well."
translations.zh: 「吾為@cook（城堡）中所有居者掌@castle（城堡），亦為與不列顛王共@guests（膳）之賓客做菜。」

translations.en: "'Tis sastisfying work, yet at times I wish I could @travel with one such as you..."
translations.zh: 「此業甚足吾意，然偶望能與汝這般之人共@travel（遊）…」

translations.en: gues,dine
"Lord British has many friends."
cast
"A fancier home than any of my family ever lived in. Yet I still miss my simple hut in the forest."
translations.zh: 「比吾家祖輩所居皆豪奢之屋。然吾仍懷念林中那簡樸小屋。」

translations.en: "I wish it were still there, so I could invite you to come spend an evening by the @fireplace with me...
translations.zh: 「願它尚存，吾便可邀汝來@fireplace（爐火）邊共度一宵…
translations.note: fireplace → 爐火；無結尾引號保留

translations.en: spen,even,fire,invi
"There's fire enough in my kitchen, but 'tis no place for romance."
translations.zh: 「廚中之火足矣，惟非適浪漫之所。」

translations.en: kitc,plac,roma,trav,wish,join,warr
"I shouldn't even speak of such things."
"After all, you are the Avatar, and I but a lowly cook. Please forgive me."
translations.zh: 「畢竟汝乃聖者，吾不過卑微廚子。望汝寬恕。」

translations.en: lord,brit
"He's a good man. Likes plenty of @pepper in his stew."
translations.zh: 「他是個好人。喜在@pepper（燉湯）中多放胡椒。」

translations.en: pepp,stew
"Spice puts some variety in life, is what I always say."
translations.zh: 「香料為生活添點變化，此乃吾常言。」

translations.en: spic
"You're a pretty spicy little number yourself!"
translations.zh: 「汝自個兒也是個夠味之小尤物呢！」

translations.en: spic,vari,life,frie,hear,adve,peop,happ
"Yes indeed."
avat
"I've heard about all of your adventures. I wish I were a warrior too, and not just a cook!"
translations.zh: 「汝之冒險吾皆有所聞。多願吾亦能為武士，而非僅一廚子！」

translations.en: cook
"I like having a job where I can make people happy."
bye
"See you later. And next time you dine with his majesty, I'll cook you something special."
translations.zh: 「後會。下回汝與陛下同膳時，吾必為汝烹一道特別之菜。」

translations.en: He seems about to say more, with a hopeful look in his eyes.
translations.zh: 他似欲再言，眼中懷著期盼之色。

translations.en: But then he turns away without speaking.
"Funny you should mention that... It reminds me of my secret recipe for @roast boar."
translations.zh: 「妙哉汝提起此事…令吾憶起@roast（烤豬）之祕方。」

riddles_additions.en: I wish it were still there, so I could invite you to come spend an evening by the fireplace with me...
riddles_additions.zh: 願它尚存，吾便可邀汝來爐火邊共度一宵…
riddles_additions.ref: Maldric 對 Avatar 的浪漫求愛暗示；遊戲中宮廷廚子單戀玩家
riddles_additions.strategy: 保留含蓄浪漫語氣；『共度一宵』翻譯 spend an evening 留含蓄

riddles_additions.en: You're a pretty spicy little number yourself!
riddles_additions.zh: 汝自個兒也是個夠味之小尤物呢！
riddles_additions.ref: spicy number = 性感小可人；spice/spicy 雙關（食物香料 vs. 人物嗆辣）
riddles_additions.strategy: 保留 spice 雙關意味：『夠味』兼指食物與人物魅力

translator_notes: Maldric 為宮廷廚師，背景設定豐富（野豬獵人轉廚）。對 Avatar 含浪漫單戀調情語氣，依 $G 性別變數顯示不同台詞（女性聖者最美、男性聖者最偉大）。Lord British 首次於對話中出現用全稱『不列顛王』，後續用『陛下』。避『餐』改『膳』（5C-trail c05c）。Maldric 譯『馬德力』新詞。所有 zh_bytes ≤ len，0 OVERFLOW。
